title: Review the backup procedure
description: Trace how the database is backed up and report whether the method yields a consistent, verifiable copy.
body: Use when validating data safety for an SQLite app. Actions: trace the backup path and report whether it uses the online backup API / VACUUM INTO / .backup versus a live file copy; in WAL mode confirm a plain copy is not taken without checkpoint and sidecar files; check that backups are verified with integrity_check and that restore is rehearsed. Do not accept a cron cp of a live .db as a backup. Report and record the method and classify it as consistent-and-verified or unsafe-file-copy. This skill is read-only. Validation signals include a restored backup passing integrity_check and smoke queries. Risk boundary: an unverified live-file-copy backup may be silently corrupt — flag it as a data-loss risk.
